title: 2026 Golden Globe Best Animated Feature Nominees Analysis
text: The six nominees for the 2026 Golden Globe Best Animated Feature award include diverse contenders. Arco recently triumphed at the National Board of Review, positioning it as a potential upset candidate similar to how Flow disrupted last year's race. Demon Slayer: Kimetsu no Yaiba – The Movie: Infinity Castle was notably absent from Critics' Choice Awards but secured a Golden Globe nomination, marking a significant boost after missing that earlier competition. Elio is a Pixar entry competing for one of five available Oscar slots, facing competition from other contenders vying for that final nomination spot. KPop Demon Hunters is the most-nominated animated film at the ceremony with three total nominations and is described as the populous pick, expected to dominate televised award competitions. Little Amélie or the Character of Rain is gaining momentum through wins at regional critics' circles, including the Los Angeles Film Critics Association Awards, though it remains ineligible for BAFTA consideration. Zootopia 2 is the Disney sequel securing recognition in both the animated feature and cinematic achievement categories at the Golden Globes. The ceremony announcement was scheduled for January 11, 2026.
